ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Student's minor */,
  "entrance_date" TEXT /* Date the student entered the program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade the student received in the course */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance record for the student in the course */,
  "participation" REAL /* Participation record for the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., quiz, project, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score the student received on the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_grade" TEXT /* Predicted grade for the course */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_predictions_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_gpa" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the GPA belongs to */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA for the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_gpa_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prev_term_gpa" (
  "prev_gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each previous term GPA record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the GPA belongs to */,
  "prev_term_gpa" REAL /* Previous term GPA for the student */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term for which the GPA was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prev_gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prev_term_gpa_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "struggle" (
  "struggle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each struggle record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the struggle belongs to */,
  "struggle_level" INTEGER /* Struggle level for the student (1-5) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the struggle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("struggle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggle_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the recommendation belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended course */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the intervention belongs to */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., tutoring, mentoring) */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was implemented */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning objective */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the objective belongs to */,
  "objective_description" TEXT /* Description of the learning objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_objectives_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_objective_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the progress belongs to */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning objective */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress toward the learning objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_objective_progress_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES learning_objectives ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_objective_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
